title: Absorption costing
summary: 9706 P2 — overhead absorption rates, full unit cost, and over/under absorption.
learningObjectives: Allocate and apportion overheads to cost centres.
Prepare profit statements under absorption costing.

simpleExplanation.title: Sharing factory costs
simpleExplanation.summary: Absorption costing spreads all production overheads into product cost using predetermined rates — differences from actual create over/under absorption.

flashcards.back: Budgeted production overhead ÷ Budgeted activity level.
Actual overhead > absorbed — increases expenses (reduce profit).
Direct labour hours, machine hours, units produced.
Direct materials + direct labour + absorbed overhead.

sections.content: **Absorption costing** (2.2.2) — show **OAR calculation** and **adjustment for under/over absorption** in SPL. State basis of absorption.

sections.question: Budgeted overhead $96,000; budgeted machine hours 12,000. Actual overhead $99,000; actual machine hours 11,500. Calculate OAR, absorbed overhead, and under/over absorption.
sections.solution:
**OAR** = 96,000 ÷ 12,000 = **$8 per machine hour**

**Absorbed overhead** = 11,500 × $8 = **$92,000**

**Actual overhead** = **$99,000**

**Under-absorption** = 99,000 − 92,000 = **$7,000**

**SPL adjustment:** Add **$7,000** to production costs (or cost of sales) — **reduces profit**.
